display.name: $$$ Royal - Mashup (431)
display.author: $$$ Royal
display.blurb: Layered chaos that pulses with multiple overlapping rhythms.

annotation.technical_notes: A viscous, metallic fluid simulation driven by a per-pixel warp shader that mimics liquid mercury or oil-slick dynamics. Chromatic aberration fringes the edges of the cellular droplets, which expand and divide in response to the audio's bass transients. Frame feedback through sampler_main with high-frequency noise creates a shimmering, organic texture that cycles through vivid purple, green, and blue hues.
